title: Globex — CSRD materiality workshop debrief
transcript: Sofia (Globex, VP Regulatory Affairs): The materiality workshop surfaced water stress and biodiversity as topics our stakeholders care about more than we expected. Consultant: That's a significant finding — we decided to add both to the double-materiality matrix as financially material topics rather than impact-only. Sofia: Agreed. Consultant: I'll update the draft matrix and circulate it by May 22. Sofia: Great, we need it before the legal review on May 27. Consultant: Something worth noting as a general pattern — stakeholder workshops consistently surface topics that management pre-assessments miss. Running the workshop early in the CSRD process pays dividends. Sofia: We should have done this six months ago. Consultant: The revised reporting boundary will also need sign-off from your CFO — I'll send you a one-pager framing the financial materiality case for those two topics by May 21.
